hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'project.yml'; then cd /Users/erik/Developer/Harbor && xcodegen generate 2>&1 | tail -1; fi; killall Harbor 2>/dev/null; xcodebuild -project /Users/erik/Developer/Harbor/Harbor.xcodeproj -scheme Harbor -configuration Debug build -quiet 2>&1 | tail -3
